name: spectral-cyclops
description: Automated Visual Regression & AI-Polish Framework. Captures screenshots, diffs baselines, opens GitHub PRs — and runs a file-watcher so an AI assistant can iterate on your UI in real time.

scripts.qa:baseline: node -e "const{DIRS}=require('./src/utils');const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');fs.mkdirSync(DIRS.before,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(DIRS.after).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.png')).forEach(f=>{fs.copyFileSync(path.join(DIRS.after,f),path.join(DIRS.before,f));console.log('  ✅  Baseline set:',f);});console.log('\n  Baseline updated from screenshots/after/\n');"
